title: Carney Institute for Brain Science
body: The Robert J. & Nancy D. Carney Institute for Brain Science is a cross-departmental neuroscience research institute at Brown University in Providence, Rhode Island. The institute's core focus areas include brain-computer interfaces and computational neuroscience. The institute also focuses on research into mechanisms of cell death with the interest of developing therapies for neurodegenerative diseases.
